name: Protobuf.Token

unions.name: Error
unions.comment: The ways a token decoding can fail

aliases.name: TokenData
aliases.comment: Claims encoded in the token and some metadata

values.name: decode
values.comment: Decodes a Protobuf Web Token using the given decoder.
values.type: Protobuf.Decode.Decoder t -> String.String -> Result.Result Protobuf.Token.Error (Protobuf.Token.TokenData t)

values.name: decodeBytes
values.comment: Decodes a Protobuf Web Token from the compact byte format using the given decoder.
values.type: Protobuf.Decode.Decoder t -> Bytes.Bytes -> Result.Result Protobuf.Token.Error (Protobuf.Token.TokenData t)

values.name: errorToString
values.comment: Converts an `Error` to a string representation for debugging or error reporting.
